notableEvents.label: Xander Bogaerts reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Masyn Winn.

notableEvents.label: Ty France GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ty France grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Ramón Laureano out at 2nd. Ty France out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ty France rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ty France grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Ramón Laureano out at 2nd. Ty France out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Xander Bogaerts reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Masyn Winn.

notableEvents.label: Masyn Winn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to second baseman Sung-Mun Song to first baseman Ty France. Jordan Walker to 3rd. Nolan Gorman out at 2nd. Masyn Winn out at 1st.
